subject: thermal: thermal_of: Fix error return code of thermal_of_populate_bind_params()
notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. Adapted err-1-rep2 predicate template (`int err = 0;` -> `int ret;`) to the thermal_of_populate_bind_params shape. Seed's `int ret, i, count;` is declared without initializer, so the P1 helper drops the `errVar.getInitializer().getExpr().getValue() = 0` clause. Single predicate `isRetReturnFunction`; P2 (failure-branch goto) + P3 (ret-not-set-before-goto) inlined in assembly where-clause per L0 N_PRED=1 constraint. final.ql compiles on first try; on POC mini-DB it fires only on `thermal_of_populate_bind_params_buggy` at poc.c:89 and poc.c:94 (the `!count` and `!__tcbp` goto-end sites), silent on `_fixed` twin. L0 accepts on first successful compile per spec.
